Entry.JapaneseText: シュヴァルツ……。 人々の祈りや願いを欲望として受け止めて 生まれてしまった、世界樹の闇か
Entry.EnglishText: Schwartz... Is she the darkness that was born from the World Tree misunderstanding people's prayers and wishes as just desires?

Entry.JapaneseText: こいつをこのままにしておけば 世界は終わってしまうな
Entry.EnglishText: If we leave her be, the whole world will end.

Entry.JapaneseText: めんどくせぇな。 なにが闇だよ。 意味わかんねぇっつーの
Entry.EnglishText: This is so annoying. What's so dark about those things? I don't get this at all.

Entry.JapaneseText: やっちまおうぜ、ガイ。 こんなわけわかんねぇ奴に 俺んち壊されてたまるか
Entry.EnglishText: Let's get her, Guy. I'm not gonna let some lady I don't even get the point of destroy my house.

Entry.JapaneseText: 戦う動機はそこなんだな……
Entry.EnglishText: So that's your incentive for fighting her...
